---
title: 💝
---

<div class='love-overlay'>
  <img class='love-gif' src='data:image/gif;base64,' alt='💝' />
</div>

<style>
.love-overlay {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 9999;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #ffe4f0 0%, #ffd6e8 35%, #fff0fa 65%, #ffecd2 100%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.love-gif {
  max-width: min(90vw, 90vh);
  max-height: min(90vw, 90vh);
  object-fit: contain;
  border-radius: 16px;
}
</style>
